---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
The use case or pain point motivating the request.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like scView to do.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about, if any.

**Additional context**
Dataset types, scale (number of cells), screenshots, or links to relevant methods/papers.
